_metadata.description: G1 character appearances — NA cartoon (S1-S4 + Movie), G1 toy (cartoon-divergent + toy-only), JP Headmasters, JP Masterforce, JP Victory, JP Zone

data.name: Optimus Prime (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Tall, broad-shouldered red and blue robot with iconic silver faceplate and blue eyes. Transforms into a red Freightliner FL86 cab-over-engine semi-truck with gray trailer

data.name: Bumblebee (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small, compact yellow robot with horns on head and blue eyes. Transforms into a yellow Volkswagen Beetle

data.name: Cliffjumper (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small red robot similar in stature to Bumblebee with horns and blue eyes. Transforms into a red Porsche 924 Turbo

data.name: Jazz (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek white robot with blue visor and stylish design. Transforms into a white Porsche 935 Turbo with racing stripes

data.name: Prowl (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and black robot with door-wings on back and stern expression. Transforms into a black and white Datsun 280ZX police car

data.name: Ratchet (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red robot with rounded features and medical cross insignia. Transforms into a white and red Nissan Onebox Cherry Vanette ambulance

data.name: Ironhide (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Stocky red robot with a rounded windshield chest and no visible mouth. Transforms into a red Nissan Onebox Cherry Vanette van

data.name: Wheeljack (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White robot with distinctive ear-fins that flash when speaking and a faceplate mouth. Transforms into a white, green and red Lancia Stratos Turbo race car

data.name: Mirage (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Sleek blue and white robot with open-faced helmet and refined appearance. Transforms into a blue Ligier JS11 Formula One race car

data.name: Hound (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green military-styled robot with a star insignia on chest and holographic projector. Transforms into a green Mitsubishi J59 military jeep

data.name: Trailbreaker (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large black robot with camper shell kibble on back and friendly demeanor. Transforms into a black Toyota Hi-Lux 4WD pickup with camper shell

data.name: Sunstreaker (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow robot with sleek angular design, engine block chest, and vain personality reflected in polished appearance. Transforms into a yellow Lamborghini Countach LP500S

data.name: Sideswipe (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red robot with angular design, shoulder-mounted rocket launcher, and car hood chest. Transforms into a red Lamborghini Countach LP500S

data.name: Bluestreak (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Silver-gray robot with door-wings and shoulder cannons, similar build to Prowl. Transforms into a silver Datsun 280ZX

data.name: Windcharger (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small red robot with car hood chest and magnetic powers visualized as blue energy. Transforms into a red Pontiac Firebird Trans Am

data.name: Brawn (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small, stocky green and yellow robot with disproportionately large arms. Transforms into a green Land Rover Defender 4x4

data.name: Huffer (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small orange and blue robot with a truck cab chest and perpetually grumpy expression. Transforms into an orange semi-truck cab

data.name: Gears (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue and red robot with a broad chest and compact build. Transforms into a blue and red pickup truck

data.name: Hauler (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green robot with crane arm kibble, brief background appearance only. Transforms into a green crane truck

data.name: Skyfire (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Massive white and red robot, one of the tallest Autobots, with a jet cockpit chest and broad wings. Transforms into a large white Cybertronian spacecraft

data.name: Grimlock (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large gray and gold robot with a visor and faceplate, powerful blocky build. Transforms into a gray mechanical Tyrannosaurus Rex with gold accents and blue eyes

data.name: Slag (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and red robot with Dinobot-typical blocky build and visor. Transforms into a mechanical Triceratops that breathes fire

data.name: Sludge (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and gold robot with a gentle appearance despite large size. Transforms into a mechanical Apatosaurus (long-necked dinosaur)

data.name: Snarl (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and gold robot with solar-panel plates visible from dinosaur mode. Transforms into a mechanical Stegosaurus with gold back plates

data.name: Swoop (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and red robot with large wings folded on back, slimmer than other Dinobots. Transforms into a mechanical Pteranodon with red chest and gray wings

data.name: Megatron (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Silver-gray robot with angular helmet, red eyes, and fusion cannon mounted on right arm. Transforms into a gray Walther P38 pistol

data.name: Starscream (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray, red, and blue Seeker jet robot with distinctive wing-mounted null rays, air intakes on shoulders, and a sneering expression. Transforms into an F-15 Eagle jet with red and white markings

data.name: Soundwave (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Dark blue robot with red visor, shoulder-mounted concussion blaster, and distinctive monotone voice. Chest opens as a tape deck door to deploy cassette minions. Transforms into a blue microcassette recorder

data.name: Thundercracker (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and silver Seeker jet robot sharing the same body type as Starscream. Transforms into a blue F-15 Eagle jet

data.name: Skywarp (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black and purple Seeker jet robot sharing the same body type as Starscream, with teleportation ability. Transforms into a black and purple F-15 Eagle jet

data.name: Reflector (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Three identical purple, green and gray robots (Spectro, Viewfinder, Spyglass) that combine into a single camera. Often seen as background Decepticons

data.name: Shockwave (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large purple robot with a single yellow eye, antenna ears, and a gun barrel for a left hand. Transforms into a Cybertronian laser gun

data.name: Laserbeak (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red and black robotic condor with twin laser cannons mounted on back. Deploys from Soundwave's chest compartment. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Ravage (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black robotic jaguar with hip-mounted rocket launchers, sleek and stealthy. Deploys from Soundwave's chest compartment. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Rumble (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue robot with piledrivers that replace his arms for earthquake attacks. Deploys from Soundwave's chest compartment. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Frenzy (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small red robot nearly identical to Rumble with sonic attack capabilities. Deploys from Soundwave's chest compartment. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Scrapper (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Constructicon robot with front-end loader scoop. Forms the right leg of Devastator. Transforms into a green front-end loader

data.name: Hook (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Constructicon robot with crane boom on back. Forms the upper torso and head of Devastator. Transforms into a green crane

data.name: Bonecrusher (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Constructicon robot with bulldozer blade kibble. Forms the left arm of Devastator. Transforms into a green bulldozer

data.name: Scavenger (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Constructicon robot with power shovel arm. Forms the right arm of Devastator. Transforms into a green excavator

data.name: Long Haul (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Constructicon robot with dump bed on back. Forms the lower torso of Devastator. Transforms into a green dump truck

data.name: Mixmaster (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Constructicon robot with mixing drum kibble. Forms the left leg of Devastator. Transforms into a green and purple cement mixer truck

data.name: Devastator (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Massive green and purple combined form of the six Constructicons. Towering humanoid with visor, immense strength but limited intelligence. One of the first combiners shown in the series

data.name: Bombshell (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gold Insecticon robot with rhinoceros beetle horn used to fire cerebro-shells for mind control. Transforms into a mechanical rhinoceros beetle

data.name: Shrapnel (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gold Insecticon robot with prominent stag beetle pincers on head, known for repeating the last word of sentences. Transforms into a mechanical stag beetle

data.name: Kickback (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gold Insecticon robot with grasshopper leg kibble and wings. Transforms into a mechanical grasshopper

data.name: Teletraan I (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large stationary Autobot supercomputer built into the Ark's bridge, with a prominent display screen and orange console panels

data.name: Spike Witwicky (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Teenage human boy with brown hair, typically wearing a yellow shirt and jeans. Primary human ally of the Autobots

data.name: Sparkplug Witwicky (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Middle-aged human mechanic, Spike's father, with gray hair and typically wearing work clothes. Skilled with machinery and often assists Autobot repairs

data.name: Chip Chase (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young human computer genius in a wheelchair with brown hair and glasses. Assists the Autobots with technical and hacking expertise

data.name: Dr. Arkeville (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Elderly mad scientist with wild white hair and a hunched posture. Human collaborator with the Decepticons who uses mind-control technology

data.name: Dr. Alcazar (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Human scientist appearing briefly in the series, associated with exotic energy research

data.name: Sunstorm (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow-orange Seeker jet robot sharing the standard Seeker body type, often seen as a background Decepticon on Cybertron. Transforms into a yellow-orange Cybertronian tetrajet

data.name: Hotlink (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple Seeker jet robot sharing the standard Seeker body type, background Decepticon in Cybertron scenes. Transforms into a purple Cybertronian tetrajet

data.name: Bitstream (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Teal and gray Seeker jet robot sharing the standard Seeker body type, background Decepticon. Transforms into a teal Cybertronian tetrajet

data.name: Nacelle (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and teal Seeker jet robot sharing the standard Seeker body type, background Decepticon. Transforms into a yellow-teal Cybertronian tetrajet

data.name: Acid Storm (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Seeker jet robot with camouflage-like color scheme, background Decepticon. Transforms into a green Cybertronian tetrajet

data.name: Nova Storm (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and yellow Seeker jet robot sharing the standard Seeker body type, background Decepticon in Cybertron scenes. Transforms into an orange Cybertronian tetrajet

data.name: Ion Storm (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and red Seeker jet robot sharing the standard Seeker body type, background Decepticon. Transforms into a blue-red Cybertronian tetrajet

data.name: Guardian Robot (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Enormous non-sentient Autobot defense drone with a bulky frame and single optic sensor. Transforms into a stationary rocket platform or cannon emplacement

data.name: Tracks (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue robot with red and white accents, hood chest, and flame decals. Capable of flight in car mode. Transforms into a blue Chevrolet Corvette C3

data.name: Grapple (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange robot with crane boom on back, similar build to Inferno. Transforms into an orange Mitsubishi Fuso crane truck

data.name: Hoist (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and orange robot with tow hook kibble and friendly visor face. Transforms into a green Toyota Hi-Lux tow truck

data.name: Inferno (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red robot with fire truck ladder on back, similar build to Grapple. Transforms into a red Mitsubishi Fuso fire truck

data.name: Red Alert (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red robot with door-wings and paranoid demeanor, similar body type to Sideswipe. Transforms into a white and red Lamborghini Countach fire chief car

data.name: Smokescreen (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red, white, and blue robot with door-wings and race number markings, similar body type to Prowl and Bluestreak. Transforms into a red, white, and blue Datsun 280ZX Turbo race car

data.name: Skids (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue robot with a compact build and car hood chest. Transforms into a blue Honda City Turbo compact car

data.name: Powerglide (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small red robot with distinctive airplane nose and wings. One of the few Minibot-scale Autobots that can fly. Transforms into a red A-10 Thunderbolt II attack plane

data.name: Warpath (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small red robot with tank cannon on chest, known for comic-book sound effect exclamations (BLAM! POW! WHAM!). Transforms into a red M551 Sheridan tank

data.name: Beachcomber (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue robot with a laid-back, peace-loving personality and open-topped vehicle kibble. Transforms into a blue dune buggy

data.name: Seaspray (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue and white robot with a distinctive gargling voice and hovercraft fan kibble. Transforms into a blue and white hovercraft

data.name: Cosmos (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small green and yellow robot with a round, saucer-shaped body and stubby limbs. Transforms into a green and yellow flying saucer

data.name: Omega Supreme (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Enormous Autobot guardian with a massive claw arm and blaster arm, visor face, and monotone speech pattern. One of the largest Autobots. Transforms into a rocket base with tank and rocket

data.name: Perceptor (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red, blue, and gray robot with microscope lens on shoulder, scholarly personality, and highly technical vocabulary. Transforms into a red microscope

data.name: Blaster (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red and yellow robot with boombox chest, upbeat personality, and music-loving nature. Autobot counterpart to Soundwave. Transforms into a red boombox/radio cassette player

data.name: Dirge (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue cone-headed Seeker with modified delta wings swept forward, fear-inducing engine drone. Transforms into a blue modified F-15 Eagle jet with cone-shaped nosecone

data.name: Thrust (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Maroon cone-headed Seeker with VTOL fan intakes on wings, boastful personality. Transforms into a maroon modified F-15 Eagle VTOL jet with cone-shaped nosecone

data.name: Ramjet (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White cone-headed Seeker who loves ramming into things head-first. Transforms into a white modified F-15 Eagle jet with reinforced cone-shaped nosecone

data.name: Blitzwing (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Tan and purple Triple Changer robot with tank treads on legs and jet wings on back. Transforms into both a Type 74 tank and a MiG-25 jet

data.name: Astrotrain (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gray Triple Changer robot with shuttle wings and locomotive details. Transforms into both a JNR Class D51 steam locomotive and a space shuttle

data.name: Buzzsaw (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gold and black robotic condor, nearly identical to Laserbeak but gold-colored. Deploys from Soundwave's chest compartment. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Silverbolt (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red Aerialbot leader with Concorde nose cone on chest, acrophobic despite being a jet. Forms the torso of Superion. Transforms into a white Concorde SST airliner

data.name: Air Raid (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black and red Aerialbot with a reckless flying style. Forms a limb of Superion. Transforms into a black F-15 Eagle jet

data.name: Fireflight (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red Aerialbot, easily distracted in flight. Forms a limb of Superion. Transforms into a white and red F-4 Phantom II jet

data.name: Skydive (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and red Aerialbot, the team's aerial tactician. Forms a limb of Superion. Transforms into a gray and red F-16 Fighting Falcon jet

data.name: Slingshot (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White Aerialbot with an aggressive attitude compensating for being the slowest flyer. Forms a limb of Superion. Transforms into a white AV-8B Harrier II jump jet

data.name: Superion (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large white combined form of the five Aerialbots. Streamlined humanoid with jet wings, powerful but sometimes mentally unstable due to conflicting component personalities

data.name: Motormaster (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large black and gray Stunticon leader, menacing and brutal. Forms the torso of Menasor. Transforms into a black Kenworth K100 semi-truck

data.name: Drag Strip (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow Stunticon race car robot, competitive and arrogant. Forms a limb of Menasor. Transforms into a yellow Tyrell P34 six-wheeled Formula One race car

data.name: Dead End (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Maroon Stunticon with a nihilistic personality. Forms a limb of Menasor. Transforms into a maroon Porsche 928

data.name: Breakdown (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White Stunticon, paranoid that humans are watching him. Forms a limb of Menasor. Transforms into a white Lamborghini Countach

data.name: Wildrider (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and red Stunticon, reckless thrill-seeker who loves terrifying other drivers. Forms a limb of Menasor. Transforms into a gray Ferrari 308 GTB

data.name: Menasor (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large gray and black combined form of the five Stunticons. Powerful but mentally unstable, prone to fits of rage due to the conflicting personalities of his components

data.name: Onslaught (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and green Combaticon leader, master strategist. Forms the torso of Bruticus. Transforms into a blue anti-aircraft truck

data.name: Blast Off (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and purple Combaticon, aloof and snobbish. Forms a limb of Bruticus. Transforms into a brown space shuttle

data.name: Vortex (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and purple Combaticon helicopter robot who enjoys terrorizing passengers. Forms a limb of Bruticus. Transforms into a gray UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter

data.name: Brawl (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green Combaticon tank robot, belligerent and loud. Forms a limb of Bruticus. Transforms into a green Leopard 1 tank

data.name: Swindle (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Tan and purple Combaticon arms dealer who would sell his own teammates for parts. Forms a limb of Bruticus. Transforms into a tan FMC XR311 armored jeep

data.name: Bruticus (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large green and brown combined form of the five Combaticons. Immensely powerful but dim-witted, follows orders with brutal efficiency

data.name: Hot Spot (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue Protectobot leader, brave firefighter. Forms the torso of Defensor. Transforms into a blue Mitsubishi Fuso fire engine

data.name: Streetwise (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red Protectobot police car robot. Forms a limb of Defensor. Transforms into a white Datsun 280ZX police car

data.name: Blades (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red Protectobot helicopter robot who prefers ground combat. Forms a limb of Defensor. Transforms into a white Bell UH-1 Iroquois helicopter

data.name: First Aid (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and red Protectobot medic, pacifist who dislikes fighting. Forms a limb of Defensor. Transforms into a white Toyota Hi-Lux ambulance

data.name: Groove (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White Protectobot motorcycle robot, mellow and peace-loving. Forms a limb of Defensor. Transforms into a white Honda Gold Wing police motorcycle

data.name: Defensor (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large white and blue combined form of the five Protectobots. Devoted to protecting humans, one of the most compassionate combiners

data.name: Alpha Trion (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Ancient, elderly-looking Autobot sage with a long beard-like chin, red and blue color scheme, and stooped posture. One of the oldest Transformers, rebuilt Orion Pax into Optimus Prime

data.name: Elita One (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Pink and white female Autobot commander on Cybertron, romantic partner of Optimus Prime. Slender build with distinct feminine design. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Chromia (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue female Autobot warrior, partner of Ironhide. Distinctive blue and gray color scheme. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Moonracer (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and white female Autobot sharpshooter with a cheerful personality. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Firestar (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and red female Autobot, brave rescue specialist. Transforms into a Cybertronian truck

data.name: Orion Pax (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young, idealistic pre-Prime Autobot dock worker with a blue and red design clearly prefiguring Optimus Prime but with a more youthful, open-faced appearance. Transforms into a Cybertronian dock worker vehicle

data.name: Ariel (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young pink female Autobot, Orion Pax's girlfriend who was later rebuilt into Elita One by Alpha Trion

data.name: Dion (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young blue and yellow Autobot dock worker, friend of Orion Pax. Fatally wounded by Megatron in the flashback episode

data.name: Devcon (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white Autobot bounty hunter with a sleek, angular design and gunslinger demeanor. Transforms into a Cybertronian spacecraft

data.name: Nightbird (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black and gray human-built female ninja robot reprogrammed by the Decepticons. Sleek, agile design with shuriken and energy sword

data.name: Kremzeek (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Tiny orange electrical creature with a round body, big eyes, and mischievous grin. Created accidentally by Megatron, feeds on electrical energy and shouts its own name

data.name: TORQ III (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large supercomputer system that became self-aware and attempted to take over a city. Stationary computer installation with multiple screens

data.name: Autobot X (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Mismatched Frankenstein-style robot assembled from scrap Autobot parts, unstable and tragic. Cobbled-together appearance with asymmetrical limbs

data.name: Vector Sigma (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Ancient golden spherical supercomputer deep within Cybertron, capable of granting life and personality to Transformers. Accessed via the Circuit Key

data.name: Carly (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young human woman with blonde hair, Spike's girlfriend and later wife. Intelligent engineer who assists the Autobots with technical problems

data.name: Astoria Carlton-Ritz (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Wealthy, ditzy young human heiress with red hair. Inherits a technology company and becomes a reluctant Autobot ally

data.name: Raoul (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young human street kid with dark curly hair and a leather jacket, befriends Tracks in New York City

data.name: Shawn Berger (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Wealthy human industrialist who collaborates with Megatron to discredit the Autobots. Well-dressed businessman

data.name: Abdul Fakkadi (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Self-proclaimed Supreme Military Commander and President-for-Life of the fictional nation of Carbombya. Ally of the Decepticons

data.name: Dr. Fujiyama (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Japanese human scientist who created Nightbird, the female ninja robot. Elderly man in a lab coat

data.name: Lord Chumley (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Eccentric British big-game hunter who attempts to hunt Optimus Prime as the ultimate trophy. Wears safari attire and monocle

data.name: Auggie Cahnay (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Pompous human race car driver who challenges the Autobots. Short man with a large ego

data.name: Ali (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young human boy from the Middle East who befriends the Autobots during their adventures

data.name: Alana (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Female alien rebel leader from the planet Tlalakan, fighting against Decepticon occupation. Humanoid appearance with alien features

data.name: Deceptitran (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Alien Decepticon-allied robotic commander on the planet Tlalakan, overseeing the occupation. Mechanical alien design

data.name: Hot Rod (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young, brash orange and maroon Autobot with a spoiler on back and flame decals. Destined to become Rodimus Prime. Transforms into a futuristic Cybertronian sports car

data.name: Rodimus Prime (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Taller, more mature evolution of Hot Rod after receiving the Matrix of Leadership. Red, orange, and yellow with flame decals, Winnebago-style rear section. Transforms into a futuristic Cybertronian RV/Winnebago

data.name: Ultra Magnus (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large, imposing blue, red, and white Autobot with broad shoulders and a dutiful personality. Inner robot resembles a white Optimus Prime. Transforms into a blue car carrier truck

data.name: Arcee (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Pink and white female Autobot with a slender build, open-faced helmet, and backpack kibble. One of the most prominent female Transformers. Transforms into a pink Cybertronian convertible car

data.name: Springer (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and yellow Triple Changer Autobot with a confident, wisecracking personality. Broad-shouldered and athletic build. Transforms into both a Cybertronian helicopter and an armored car

data.name: Kup (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Teal/cyan old veteran Autobot with a weathered appearance and craggy face, constantly telling war stories. Transforms into a teal Cybertronian pickup truck

data.name: Blurr (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Light blue Autobot with a streamlined, aerodynamic build who speaks and moves at extreme speed. Transforms into a light blue Cybertronian race car

data.name: Wheelie (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small orange and gray Autobot child-like survivor from Quintessa who speaks in rhymes. Transforms into a small orange Cybertronian car

data.name: Galvatron (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gray Decepticon leader, reformatted from Megatron by Unicron. Crown-like helmet, orange cannon mounted on right arm. More powerful but less stable than Megatron. Transforms into a Cybertronian laser cannon

data.name: Cyclonus (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple Decepticon warrior, reformatted by Unicron, loyal lieutenant to Galvatron. Sleek jet-like design with swept-back wings. Transforms into a purple Cybertronian fighter jet

data.name: Scourge (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue Decepticon tracker, reformatted by Unicron, leads the Sweeps. Distinctive goatee-like chin, mustache-like facial features, and clawed hands. Transforms into a blue Cybertronian hovercraft/spacecraft

data.name: Unicron (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Colossal planet-sized Transformer, the chaos-bringer who devours worlds. In robot mode, an enormous horned figure. Transforms into a mechanical planet with a ringed equator. Voiced by Orson Welles

data.name: Wreck-Gar (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and orange Junkion leader built from scrap parts, speaks entirely in TV and radio jingles. Mustached face with a visor. Transforms into a motorcycle

data.name: Quintesson Judge (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Egg-shaped floating Quintesson with a rotating multi-faced head (each face representing a different personality), tentacles for locomotion. Presides over kangaroo courts with the verdict always being 'Innocent' followed by execution

data.name: Quintesson Prosecutor (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Tall, gaunt Quintesson with a single elongated face and tentacle limbs. Serves as prosecutor in the Quintesson courts

data.name: Kranix (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Alien inhabitant of the planet Lithone, one of the few survivors of Unicron's consumption of his world. Humanoid alien with metallic skin

data.name: Arblus (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Alien inhabitant of Lithone who perishes during Unicron's attack in the film's opening scene. Humanoid alien with metallic features

data.name: Daniel Witwicky (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Young human boy, son of Spike and Carly Witwicky. Brown hair, typically in casual clothes. Befriends the new generation of Autobots, particularly Hot Rod and Arcee

data.name: Metroplex (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Enormous Autobot city-former, one of the largest Autobots. White and red robot form towers over other Transformers. Transforms into a massive Autobot city and battle station

data.name: Sky Lynx (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue Autobot with an enormous ego to match his size. Unique among Transformers — splits into a bird-shuttle and a lynx-cat that can operate independently or combine. Transforms into a space shuttle/lynx-bird hybrid

data.name: Scamper (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small black Autobot car drone that deploys from Metroplex. One of Metroplex's autonomous components. Transforms into a small car

data.name: Six-Gun (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small white Autobot weapons drone that deploys from Metroplex, bristling with guns. One of Metroplex's autonomous components. Transforms into a gun emplacement

data.name: Slammer (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small gray Autobot tank drone that deploys from Metroplex. One of Metroplex's autonomous components. Transforms into a tank

data.name: Sandstorm (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and gray Triple Changer Autobot. Transforms into both a dune buggy and a helicopter

data.name: Broadside (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and red Triple Changer Autobot who suffers from both acrophobia and seasickness despite his alt modes. Transforms into both an aircraft carrier and an F/A-18 Hornet jet

data.name: Steeljaw (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gold robotic lion that deploys from Blaster's chest compartment. Autobot cassette with keen tracking abilities. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Ramhorn (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red and gold robotic rhinoceros that deploys from Blaster's chest compartment. Aggressive Autobot cassette. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Eject (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue humanoid Autobot cassette that deploys from Blaster's chest compartment, sports-enthusiast personality. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Rewind (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black humanoid Autobot cassette that deploys from Blaster's chest compartment, walking encyclopedia who remembers everything. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Outback (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small tan and olive Minibot with an Australian-flavored tough-guy attitude. Transforms into a tan Land Rover Defender

data.name: Pipes (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small blue and white Minibot, retool of Huffer with a friendlier disposition. Transforms into a blue semi-truck cab

data.name: Swerve (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small red and white Minibot, retool of Gears. Transforms into a red pickup truck

data.name: Tailgate (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small white Minibot, retool of Windcharger. Transforms into a white Pontiac Firebird Trans Am

data.name: Hubcap (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Small yellow Minibot, retool of Cliffjumper. Known for being a smooth talker. Transforms into a yellow Porsche 924 Turbo

data.name: Goldbug (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gold-colored rebuilt form of Bumblebee after being severely damaged. Shinier, more gold-toned version of Bumblebee's design. Transforms into a gold Volkswagen Beetle

data.name: Chase (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and red Throttlebot with a sporty design. Transforms into a blue Ferrari Testarossa

data.name: Freeway (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white Throttlebot. Transforms into a blue Chevrolet Corvette

data.name: Rollbar (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green Throttlebot with an outdoorsy personality. Transforms into a green jeep

data.name: Searchlight (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White Throttlebot. Transforms into a white Ford RS200

data.name: Wideload (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange Throttlebot with a heavyset build. Transforms into an orange dump truck

data.name: Scattershot (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Maroon and white Technobot leader, impulsive and aggressive. Forms the torso of Computron. Transforms into a Cybertronian spacecraft/cannon

data.name: Lightspeed (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Maroon Technobot speed enthusiast. Forms a limb of Computron. Transforms into a Cybertronian race car

data.name: Nosecone (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and orange Technobot with drill-bit nose. Slow but steady. Forms a limb of Computron. Transforms into a Cybertronian drill tank

data.name: Strafe (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red and white Technobot aerial member. Forms a limb of Computron. Transforms into a Cybertronian fighter jet

data.name: Afterburner (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and white Technobot motorcycle daredevil. Forms a limb of Computron. Transforms into a Cybertronian motorcycle

data.name: Computron (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large brown and white combined form of the five Technobots. Extremely intelligent but slow to act due to analyzing every possibility before making a move

data.name: Trypticon (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Enormous Decepticon city-former and Metroplex's rival. Massive purple and gray dinosaur-like robot form. Transforms into a Decepticon city and battle station

data.name: Octane (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and purple Triple Changer Decepticon, greedy fuel hoarder. Transforms into both a tanker truck and a Boeing 767 jet

data.name: Razorclaw (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black and orange Predacon leader with a patient, calculating hunting style. Forms the torso of Predaking. Transforms into a mechanical lion

data.name: Divebomb (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black and orange Predacon aerial hunter. Forms a limb of Predaking. Transforms into a mechanical eagle

data.name: Headstrong (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and black Predacon, charges headfirst into battle. Forms a limb of Predaking. Transforms into a mechanical rhinoceros

data.name: Rampage (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Orange and black Predacon with a fierce temperament. Forms a limb of Predaking. Transforms into a mechanical tiger

data.name: Tantrum (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and black Predacon prone to uncontrollable rages. Forms a limb of Predaking. Transforms into a mechanical bull

data.name: Predaking (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Massive black and orange combined form of the five Predacons. One of the most powerful combiners, with the savage cunning of a predatory animal. Wings and bestial features

data.name: Hun-Gurrr (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and purple Terrorcon leader with an insatiable appetite for destruction. Forms the torso of Abominus. Transforms into a two-headed dragon

data.name: Sinnertwin (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and orange Terrorcon. Forms a limb of Abominus. Transforms into a two-headed orthrus/dog monster

data.name: Blot (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and blue Terrorcon, the filthiest and most repulsive of the team. Forms a limb of Abominus. Transforms into a monster

data.name: Cutthroat (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White and purple Terrorcon aerial attacker. Forms a limb of Abominus. Transforms into a vulture/bird monster

data.name: Rippersnapper (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white Terrorcon land-based predator. Forms a limb of Abominus. Transforms into a land shark/bipedal monster

data.name: Abominus (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Large white and purple combined form of the five Terrorcons. A mindless berserker driven purely by rage and hunger, considered the most savage combiner

data.name: Ratbat (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple robotic bat that deploys from Soundwave's chest compartment. Fuel auditor who monitors Decepticon energy efficiency. Transforms into a microcassette tape

data.name: Runabout (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Black Battlecharger who loves destruction and vandalism. Frequently paired with Runamuck. Transforms into a black Lotus Esprit

data.name: Runamuck (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: White Battlecharger, partner in chaos with Runabout. Transforms into a white Pontiac Firebird Trans Am

data.name: Gnaw (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Gray and purple Sharkticon, a foot soldier of the Quintessons used to execute prisoners. Squat, round body with powerful jaws. Transforms into a mechanical shark monster

data.name: Marissa Faireborn (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Human Earth Defense Command captain with brown hair. Daughter of Flint and Lady Jaye from G.I. Joe. Commands human forces cooperating with Autobots

data.name: Gregory Swofford (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Human senator who opposes the Autobot presence on Earth, suspicious of all Transformers

data.name: Jessica Morgan (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Human woman injured in a Transformer battle, whose father develops a hatred for all Transformers as a result

data.name: Primacron (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Tiny, ancient alien scientist who claims to have created Unicron. Monkey-like appearance with a massive ego. Works from a laboratory at the edge of the universe

data.name: Primacron's Assistant (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Benevolent energy being created by Primacron, who later turns against his creator. Glowing, ethereal alien appearance

data.name: Tornedron (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Energy-draining entity created by Primacron as a successor to Unicron. Appears as a swirling vortex of energy that consumes everything in its path

data.name: Dirk Manus (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Human secret agent working with the Autobots. Suave, action-hero type

data.name: Skuxxoid (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Reptilian alien mercenary, scaly green skin with a hunched posture. Works for whoever pays, often employed by Quintessons

data.name: Fortress Maximus (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Colossal Autobot Headmaster city-former, the largest Autobot. White, blue, and red robot that towers over all others. Cerebros forms his head. Transforms into a massive Autobot city and battle station

data.name: Cerebros (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Pacifist Autobot Headmaster who forms the head of Fortress Maximus. Medium-sized gray and blue robot. Binary-bonded with the Nebulan Spike (in the NA cartoon)

data.name: Chromedome (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Brown and tan Autobot Headmaster with a computer specialist personality. Binary-bonded with Stylor. Transforms into a Cybertronian sports car

data.name: Hardhead (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green Autobot Headmaster tank warrior, stubborn and hard-charging. Binary-bonded with Duros. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank

data.name: Highbrow (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue Autobot Headmaster helicopter pilot, intellectual and somewhat snobbish. Binary-bonded with Gort. Transforms into a Cybertronian helicopter

data.name: Brainstorm (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Teal Autobot Headmaster jet, brilliant inventor. Binary-bonded with Arcana. Transforms into a Cybertronian fighter jet

data.name: Stylor (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Chromedome, fashion-conscious and vain. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Chromedome's head

data.name: Duros (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Hardhead, battle-hardened veteran soldier. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Hardhead's head

data.name: Gort (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Highbrow, humble farmer turned warrior. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Highbrow's head

data.name: Arcana (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Brainstorm, mad scientist type. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Brainstorm's head

data.name: Scorponok (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Enormous Decepticon Headmaster city-former and Fortress Maximus's rival. Purple and green scorpion-based design. Lord Zarak forms his head. Transforms into a giant scorpion and a Decepticon city/battle station

data.name: Mindwipe (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and gray Decepticon Headmaster with hypnotic powers and a vampire bat alt mode. Binary-bonded with Vorath. Transforms into a mechanical bat

data.name: Skullcruncher (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Decepticon Headmaster with a voracious appetite. Binary-bonded with Grax. Transforms into a mechanical crocodile

data.name: Weirdwolf (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Yellow and teal Decepticon Headmaster who speaks with inverted syntax. Binary-bonded with Monzo. Transforms into a mechanical wolf

data.name: Lord Zarak (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Corrupt Nebulan leader and Decepticon collaborator who becomes Scorponok's head. Authoritative humanoid alien in ornate attire

data.name: Vorath (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Mindwipe, disgraced scientist. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Mindwipe's head

data.name: Grax (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Skullcruncher, industrialist. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Skullcruncher's head

data.name: Monzo (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Weirdwolf, thuggish enforcer. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Weirdwolf's head

data.name: Pointblank (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and gray Autobot Targetmaster who distrusts the Nebulan partnership. Binary-bonded with Peacemaker who becomes his gun. Transforms into a Cybertronian car

data.name: Sureshot (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue Autobot Targetmaster marksman. Binary-bonded with Spoilsport who becomes his gun. Transforms into a Cybertronian buggy

data.name: Crosshairs (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Teal Autobot Targetmaster with careful, precise aim. Binary-bonded with Pinpointer who becomes his gun. Transforms into a Cybertronian truck

data.name: Peacemaker (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Pointblank, ironic name for a weapons partner. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Pointblank's gun

data.name: Spoilsport (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Sureshot, competitive and argumentative. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Sureshot's gun

data.name: Pinpointer (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Crosshairs, precise and methodical. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Crosshairs's gun

data.name: Triggerhappy (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and gray Decepticon Targetmaster who loves firing his weapons indiscriminately. Binary-bonded with Blowpipe. Transforms into a Cybertronian fighter jet

data.name: Misfire (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Magenta and gray Decepticon Targetmaster who is a notoriously terrible shot. Binary-bonded with Aimless. Transforms into a Cybertronian fighter jet

data.name: Slugslinger (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue Decepticon Targetmaster with a distinctive twin-cockpit jet design. Binary-bonded with Caliburst. Transforms into a Cybertronian twin-cockpit fighter jet

data.name: Blowpipe (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Triggerhappy, obnoxious braggart. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Triggerhappy's gun

data.name: Aimless (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Misfire, shares his partner's lack of accuracy. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Misfire's gun

data.name: Caliburst (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Slugslinger. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Slugslinger's gun

data.name: Sixshot (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Green and purple Decepticon Six Changer, one-robot army. Large, imposing robot with six alternate modes: jet, laser pistol, armored carrier, winged wolf, tank, and robot

data.name: Fastlane (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red Autobot Clone, shares an identical robot mode with Cloudraker but a different alt mode. Thrill-seeker personality. Transforms into a red dragster

data.name: Cloudraker (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Red Autobot Clone, shares an identical robot mode with Fastlane but a different alt mode. Competitive with his clone brother. Transforms into a red jet

data.name: Pounce (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue Decepticon Clone, shares an identical robot mode with Wingspan but a different alt mode. Ambush specialist. Transforms into a puma

data.name: Wingspan (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue Decepticon Clone, shares an identical robot mode with Pounce but a different alt mode. Intelligence gatherer. Transforms into a hawk

data.name: Battletrap (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and gray Decepticon Duocon — a single robot that splits into two separate vehicles (a helicopter and an off-road vehicle) rather than one

data.name: Flywheels (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Maroon and gray Decepticon Duocon — a single robot that splits into two separate vehicles (a jet and a tank) rather than one

data.name: Apeface (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Purple and black Decepticon Horrorcon and Headmaster with a brutish personality. Binary-bonded with Spasma. Transforms into both a jet and a mechanical ape

data.name: Snapdragon (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Blue and white Decepticon Horrorcon and Headmaster, lazy but dangerous. Binary-bonded with Krunk. Transforms into both a jet and a mechanical dinosaur

data.name: Spasma (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Apeface, nervous and twitchy. Small humanoid alien who transforms into Apeface's head

data.name: Krunk (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Nebulan partner of Snapdragon, Lord Zarak's bodyguard. Small but tough humanoid alien who transforms into Snapdragon's head

data.name: Punch-Counterpunch (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Unique Autobot double agent with two distinct robot modes — blue Autobot (Punch) and yellow Decepticon (Counterpunch). Transforms into a blue Pontiac Fiero

data.name: Llyra (G1 Cartoon)
data.description: Female Nebulan rebel who aids the Autobots against Lord Zarak's tyranny. Humanoid alien with distinct Nebulan features

data.name: Camshaft (G1 Toy)
data.description: Silver and gray Autobot Omnibot with sleek sports car styling and chrome details. Transforms into a Mazda Savanna RX-7 sports car.

data.name: Downshift (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and red Autobot Omnibot with compact build and racing accents. Transforms into a Toyota Celica XX.

data.name: Overdrive (G1 Toy)
data.description: Red Autobot Omnibot with sleek Italian supercar proportions and chrome bumper. Transforms into a Ferrari 512 BB.

data.name: Aragon (G1 Toy)
data.description: Small blue Autobot Powerdasher with pull-back motor action and simple transformation. Transforms into a drill tank.

data.name: Cromar (G1 Toy)
data.description: Small blue Autobot Powerdasher with pull-back motor and swept-wing jet styling. Transforms into a jet.

data.name: Zetar (G1 Toy)
data.description: Small blue Autobot Powerdasher with pull-back motor and low-profile race car design. Transforms into a race car.

data.name: Barrage (G1 Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Decepticon Deluxe Insecticon with insectoid robot mode and mandible claws. Transforms into a rhinoceros beetle.

data.name: Chop Shop (G1 Toy)
data.description: Dark brown and black Decepticon Deluxe Insecticon with pincer arms and angular beetle features. Transforms into a stag beetle.

data.name: Ransack (G1 Toy)
data.description: Green and yellow Decepticon Deluxe Insecticon with spring-loaded legs and grasshopper features. Transforms into a grasshopper.

data.name: Venom (G1 Toy)
data.description: Gold and black Decepticon Deluxe Insecticon with translucent wings and insectoid head. Transforms into a cicada.

data.name: Roadbuster (G1 Toy)
data.description: Olive green and orange Autobot with heavily armed robot mode featuring numerous weapon hardpoints. Transforms into a military off-road vehicle.

data.name: Whirl (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue and white Autobot with tall, lanky robot mode and pincer claws instead of hands. Transforms into an AH-1 Cobra attack helicopter.

data.name: Topspin (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and blue Autobot Jumpstarter with spring-loaded automatic transformation mechanism. Transforms into a Cybertronian fighter craft.

data.name: Twin Twist (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue and white Autobot Jumpstarter with spring-loaded automatic transformation and twin drill nosecone. Transforms into a Cybertronian drill tank.

data.name: Backstreet (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue and white Autobot Triggerbot with spring-loaded pop-out weapon feature. Transforms into a race car.

data.name: Dogfight (G1 Toy)
data.description: Tan and brown Autobot Triggerbot with spring-loaded weapon deployment and compact jet styling. Transforms into a fighter jet.

data.name: Override (G1 Toy)
data.description: Red Autobot Triggerbot with spring-loaded pop-out weapons and slim motorcycle-derived build. Transforms into a motorcycle.

data.name: Crankcase (G1 Toy)
data.description: Dark blue Decepticon Triggercon with spring-loaded weapon gimmick and rugged off-road build. Transforms into an off-road vehicle.

data.name: Ruckus (G1 Toy)
data.description: Gray and purple Decepticon Triggercon with spring-loaded weapon deployment and wide-wheeled stance. Transforms into a dune buggy.

data.name: Windsweeper (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and teal Decepticon Triggercon with spring-loaded weapon gimmick and swept-wing bomber design. Transforms into a B-1 Lancer bomber.

data.name: Fizzle (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue and orange Autobot Sparkabot with friction-spark engine gimmick and compact buggy frame. Transforms into a dune buggy.

data.name: Guzzle (G1 Toy)
data.description: Green and gray Autobot Sparkabot with friction-spark engine gimmick and stocky tank-derived build. Transforms into a tank.

data.name: Sizzle (G1 Toy)
data.description: Red and orange Autobot Sparkabot with friction-spark engine gimmick and aerodynamic sports car styling. Transforms into a sports car.

data.name: Cindersaur (G1 Toy)
data.description: Orange and purple Decepticon Firecon with friction-spark breathing gimmick and hunched dinosaur stance. Transforms into a dinosaur creature.

data.name: Flamefeather (G1 Toy)
data.description: Red and yellow Decepticon Firecon with friction-spark breathing gimmick and avian robot design. Transforms into a bird creature.

data.name: Sparkstalker (G1 Toy)
data.description: Purple and blue Decepticon Firecon with friction-spark breathing gimmick and insectoid limbs. Transforms into an insect creature.

data.name: Getaway (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and blue Autobot Powermaster with engine-partner Nebulan figure that unlocks transformation. Transforms into a Mazda RX-7 sports car.

data.name: Joyride (G1 Toy)
data.description: Red and gray Autobot Powermaster with engine-partner Nebulan figure and rugged off-road proportions. Transforms into an off-road buggy.

data.name: Slapdash (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and red Autobot Powermaster with engine-partner Nebulan figure and streamlined racer build. Transforms into a race car.

data.name: Dreadwind (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue and gray Decepticon Powermaster with engine-partner Hi-Test and fighter jet fuselage torso. Transforms into an F-16 fighter jet and forms the lower body of Dreadwing.

data.name: Darkwing (G1 Toy)
data.description: Teal and gray Decepticon Powermaster with engine-partner Throttle and swept-wing bomber torso. Transforms into a Panavia Tornado fighter jet and forms the upper body of Dreadwing.

data.name: Dreadwing (G1 Toy)
data.description: Large Decepticon super-jet formed by combining Dreadwind and Darkwing in their jet modes into a massive twin-fuselage fighter. A Powermaster combiner requiring both engine partners to unlock.

data.name: Doubledealer (G1 Toy)
data.description: Tan and blue Powermaster with dual allegiance gimmick — Autobot bird mode and Decepticon robot mode activated by swapping engine partners. Transforms into a missile carrier.

data.name: Quickswitch (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and blue Autobot six-changer with six distinct modes including robot, drill tank, jet, hovercraft, pistol, and puma. One of the most versatile G1 figures.

data.name: Landfill (G1 Toy)
data.description: Yellow and orange Autobot Double Targetmaster with two Nebulan weapon partners, Silencer and Flintlock. Transforms into a dump truck.

data.name: Quickmix (G1 Toy)
data.description: Orange and gray Autobot Double Targetmaster with two Nebulan weapon partners, Boomer and Ricochet. Transforms into a cement mixer.

data.name: Scoop (G1 Toy)
data.description: Yellow Autobot Double Targetmaster with two Nebulan weapon partners, Tracer and Holepunch. Transforms into a front-end loader.

data.name: Needlenose (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and teal Decepticon Double Targetmaster with two Nebulan weapon partners, Sunbeam and Zigzag. Transforms into an F-16 fighter jet.

data.name: Quake (G1 Toy)
data.description: Dark red and gray Decepticon Double Targetmaster with two Nebulan weapon partners, Tiptop and Heater. Transforms into a tank.

data.name: Spinister (G1 Toy)
data.description: Purple and pink Decepticon Double Targetmaster with two Nebulan weapon partners, Singe and Hairsplitter. Transforms into an attack helicopter.

data.name: Nightbeat (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue and yellow Autobot Headmaster with Nebulan partner Muzzle forming the head. Transforms into a Porsche 959.

data.name: Hosehead (G1 Toy)
data.description: Red and white Autobot Headmaster with Nebulan partner Lug forming the head. Transforms into a fire engine.

data.name: Siren (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue and red Autobot Headmaster with Nebulan partner Quig forming the head. Transforms into a fire chief car.

data.name: Fangry (G1 Toy)
data.description: Pink and gray Decepticon Headmaster with Nebulan partner Brisko forming the head. Transforms into a winged wolf beast.

data.name: Horri-Bull (G1 Toy)
data.description: Red and blue Decepticon Headmaster with Nebulan partner Kreb forming the head. Transforms into a bull beast.

data.name: Squeezeplay (G1 Toy)
data.description: Magenta and blue Decepticon Headmaster with Nebulan partner Lokos forming the head. Transforms into a crab beast.

data.name: Cloudburst (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender with a heroic armored human outer shell wielding a lightning bolt weapon. Inner robot is white and red, transforming into a Cybertronian jet.

data.name: Groundbreaker (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender with a muscular armored human outer shell and visor helmet. Inner robot is gray and blue, transforming into a Cybertronian race car.

data.name: Landmine (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender with a space-suited human outer shell and domed helmet. Inner robot is white and gray, transforming into a Cybertronian car.

data.name: Sky High (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender with a winged aviator human outer shell in blue armor. Inner robot is white and blue, transforming into a Cybertronian helicopter.

data.name: Splashdown (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender with a trident-wielding aquatic human outer shell in blue and white armor. Inner robot is white, transforming into a Cybertronian submarine.

data.name: Waverider (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender with a finned aquatic human outer shell in yellow and blue. Inner robot is white and yellow, transforming into a Cybertronian hovercraft.

data.name: Gunrunner (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender Vehicle with a jet-shaped outer shell that conceals the inner robot. Inner robot is small and white, transforming into a jet.

data.name: Bomb-Burst (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a monstrous vampire-like outer shell with bat wings and fangs. Inner robot is blue and white, transforming into a Cybertronian jet.

data.name: Bugly (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a demonic insectoid outer shell with horns and claws. Inner robot is gray and purple, transforming into a Cybertronian jet.

data.name: Finback (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a fish-like humanoid outer shell with fins and aquatic features. Inner robot is teal and gray, transforming into a Cybertronian submarine.

data.name: Iguanus (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a reptilian humanoid outer shell with lizard-like head and scaled armor. Inner robot is purple, transforming into a motorcycle.

data.name: Skullgrin (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a skeletal skull-faced humanoid outer shell with horns and bone-like armor. Inner robot is gray, transforming into a Cybertronian tank.

data.name: Submarauder (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a tentacled sea-creature outer shell with octopus-like features. Inner robot is purple and gray, transforming into a Cybertronian submarine.

data.name: Roadgrabber (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Vehicle with a jet-shaped outer shell that conceals the inner robot. Inner robot is small and purple, transforming into a jet.

data.name: Catilla (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender Beast with a sabertooth tiger outer shell in tan and orange. Inner robot is white and red, with a simple transformation.

data.name: Chainclaw (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Pretender Beast with a bear outer shell in brown and tan. Inner robot is white and blue, with a simple transformation.

data.name: Carnivac (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Beast with a wolf outer shell in gray and blue. Inner robot is yellow and gray, with a simple transformation.

data.name: Snarler (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Beast with a boar outer shell in brown and gray. Inner robot is purple and gray, with a simple transformation.

data.name: Grand Slam (G1 Toy)
data.description: Gold Autobot cassette robot who combines with Raindance to form Slamdance. Transforms into a microcassette.

data.name: Raindance (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue Autobot cassette jet who combines with Grand Slam to form Slamdance. Transforms into a microcassette.

data.name: Slamdance (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot cassette combiner formed by merging Grand Slam and Raindance. A gold and blue combined robot wielding their unified weaponry.

data.name: Beastbox (G1 Toy)
data.description: Blue Decepticon cassette gorilla who combines with Squawktalk to form Squawkbox. Transforms into a microcassette.

data.name: Squawktalk (G1 Toy)
data.description: Purple Decepticon cassette bird who combines with Beastbox to form Squawkbox. Transforms into a microcassette.

data.name: Squawkbox (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon cassette combiner formed by merging Beastbox and Squawktalk. A blue and purple combined robot with simian and avian features.

data.name: Bumblebee Pretender (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Classic Pretender with an armored human outer shell in yellow and black. Inner robot is a simplified Bumblebee, transforming into a Volkswagen Beetle.

data.name: Grimlock Pretender (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Classic Pretender with an armored caveman-like outer shell wielding a club. Inner robot is a simplified Grimlock, transforming into a dinosaur.

data.name: Jazz Pretender (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Classic Pretender with a sleek armored human outer shell in white. Inner robot is a simplified Jazz, transforming into a Porsche.

data.name: Starscream Pretender (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Classic Pretender with a skeletal knight outer shell in black armor. Inner robot is a simplified Starscream, transforming into a jet.

data.name: Vroom (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Mega Pretender with a large outer shell that transforms into a race car, concealing the inner robot. Inner robot transforms into a dragster.

data.name: Crossblades (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Mega Pretender with a large outer shell that transforms into a helicopter, concealing the inner robot. Inner robot also transforms into a helicopter.

data.name: Thunderwing (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Mega Pretender with a large outer shell that transforms into a jet, concealing the inner robot. Inner robot also transforms into a jet.

data.name: Skyhammer (G1 Toy)
data.description: Autobot Ultra Pretender with a large humanoid outer shell that transforms into a jet, plus a separate vehicle that the inner robot can pilot.

data.name: Roadblock (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Ultra Pretender with a large humanoid outer shell that transforms into a tank, plus a separate vehicle that the inner robot can pilot.

data.name: Birdbrain (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Monster with a winged creature outer shell. Inner robot forms the right arm of Monstructor.

data.name: Bristleback (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Monster with a spiny reptilian outer shell. Inner robot forms the left leg of Monstructor.

data.name: Icepick (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Monster with a horned beast outer shell. Inner robot forms the torso of Monstructor.

data.name: Scowl (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Monster with a fanged monster outer shell. Inner robot forms the right leg of Monstructor.

data.name: Slog (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Monster with a long-necked dinosaur-like outer shell. Inner robot forms the left arm of Monstructor.

data.name: Wildfly (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender Monster with an insectoid winged outer shell. Inner robot forms the back of Monstructor.

data.name: Monstructor (G1 Toy)
data.description: Massive Decepticon combiner formed from six Pretender Monsters — Birdbrain, Bristleback, Icepick, Scowl, Slog, and Wildfly. A towering monstrous gestalt with mismatched beast-like limbs.

data.name: Bludgeon (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a skull-faced samurai outer shell in orange and green wielding a katana. Inner robot is green and tan, transforming into a tank.

data.name: Octopunch (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a deep-sea diver outer shell with tentacle-like arms and diving helmet. Inner robot is teal and yellow, transforming into a crab vehicle.

data.name: Stranglehold (G1 Toy)
data.description: Decepticon Pretender with a muscular barbarian outer shell with horned helmet and studded armor. Inner robot is purple and gray, transforming into a Cybertronian rhino vehicle.

data.name: Doubleheader (G1 Toy)
data.description: White and blue Autobot Pretender with an armored human outer shell. Inner robot transforms into a twin-cockpit jet.

data.name: Longtooth (G1 Toy)
data.description: Gray and blue Autobot Pretender with a rugged armored human outer shell wielding a sword. Inner robot transforms into a hovercraft.

data.name: Pincher (G1 Toy)
data.description: Green and yellow Autobot Pretender with an insectoid outer shell featuring pincers and antennae. Inner robot transforms into a scorpion vehicle.

data.name: Shouki (JP Headmasters)
data.description: White and blue Trainbot with bullet train nose folded onto chest and streamlined limbs. Transforms into a Tokaido Shinkansen 0 Series bullet train.

data.name: Getsuei (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Blue Trainbot with boxy locomotive cab chest and sturdy proportions. Transforms into an EF65 electric locomotive.

data.name: Kaen (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Orange and red Trainbot with diesel engine details on torso and compact build. Transforms into a DE10 diesel locomotive.

data.name: Seizan (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Cream and red Trainbot with express train livery panels across chest and shoulders. Transforms into a 485 Series limited express train.

data.name: Suiken (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Orange and green Trainbot with commuter train paneling visible on limbs and a visor-style face. Transforms into a 153 Series express train.

data.name: Yukikaze (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Green and white Trainbot with rounded bullet train nose on chest and tall stance. Transforms into a Tohoku/Joetsu Shinkansen 200 Series bullet train.

data.name: Raiden (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Tall combined form of all six Trainbots with train components visible on limbs and a unified blue, white, and multicolored body. One of the largest Autobot combiners in the Japanese continuity.

data.name: Twincast (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Red repaint of Blaster with a boxy torso and tape deck details, serving as the Autobot communications officer. Transforms into a red boombox cassette player.

data.name: Soundblaster (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Black repaint of Soundwave with darker, more menacing color scheme and dual cassette storage chest. Transforms into a black microcassette recorder.

data.name: Grotusque (JP Headmasters)
data.description: White and red Monsterbot with bestial face and wings folded on back. Transforms into a fire-breathing winged sabertooth tiger monster.

data.name: Doublecross (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Blue and red Monsterbot with angular armor plating and twin-headed beast detailing. Transforms into a fire-breathing two-headed dragon monster.

data.name: Repugnus (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Yellow and green Monsterbot with insectoid features and clawed limbs. Transforms into a fire-breathing bug monster.

data.name: Slugfest (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Gold stegosaurus cassette with plates along the spine and a compact, armored body. Transforms into a microcassette tape.

data.name: Overkill (JP Headmasters)
data.description: Blue tyrannosaurus cassette with powerful jaws and stubby arms in a compact dinosaur frame. Transforms into a microcassette tape.

data.name: Sixknight (JP Headmasters)
data.description: White and blue six-changer with sleek armor and multiple weapon hardpoints, serving as the Autobot counterpart to Sixshot. Transforms into a Cybertronian car, jet, submarine, drill tank, winged wolf, and gun.

data.name: Snaptrap (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Bulky teal and purple Seacon warrior with jagged shell-like armor plating and menacing red visor. Transforms into a fearsome turtle monster.

data.name: Overbite (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Sleek blue Seacon with fin-like protrusions and sharp angular limbs built for underwater combat. Transforms into a mechanical shark monster.

data.name: Seawing (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Flat-bodied teal Seacon with wide wing-like shoulder panels and a streamlined aquatic design. Transforms into a manta ray monster.

data.name: Skalor (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Pink and teal Seacon with a hunched, heavily armored frame and finned extremities. Transforms into a prehistoric coelacanth monster.

data.name: Tentakil (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Purple and teal Seacon with tentacle-like appendages extending from his arms and a squat, powerful build. Transforms into a squid-octopus monster.

data.name: Nautilator (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Magenta Seacon with claw-like hands and crustacean-inspired armor segments across his torso. Transforms into a lobster monster and serves as Piranacon's weapon.

data.name: Piranacon (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Massive teal and purple combined form of the six Seacons, towering over most Transformers with heavy aquatic armor and immense clawed hands. Wields Nautilator as a weapon in his combined mode.

data.name: Metalhawk (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Red and white Autobot Pretender who appears as a heroic human figure before revealing his inner robot form with swept-back wings. Transforms into a Cybertronian fighter jet.

data.name: Lander (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Green Autobot Pretender with a sturdy human-like outer shell concealing a compact inner robot. Transforms into a Cybertronian car.

data.name: Diver (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Blue Autobot Pretender with an athletic human-like shell suited for aquatic operations. Transforms into a Cybertronian submarine.

data.name: Phoenix (JP Masterforce)
data.description: White and red Autobot Pretender with a slim human-like outer form and wings integrated into the inner robot mode. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet.

data.name: Blood (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Red and black Decepticon Pretender with a sinister human-like shell and aggressive angular inner robot. Transforms into a Cybertronian jet.

data.name: Dauros (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Green Decepticon Pretender with a brutish human-like outer shell and heavily armored inner robot form. Transforms into a Cybertronian tank.

data.name: Gilmer (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Blue and green Decepticon Pretender whose outer shell resembles a fish-man creature, concealing a sleek inner robot. Transforms into a Cybertronian submarine.

data.name: Ginrai (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Tall red and blue Godmaster with a broad chest and iconic faceplate resembling Optimus Prime. Transforms into a Freightliner cab-over-engine tractor trailer, and can power up into Super Ginrai with trailer armor or God Ginrai with Godbomber.

data.name: Lightfoot (JP Masterforce)
data.description: White and blue Autobot Godmaster with a sleek, aerodynamic frame and visor-style eyes. Transforms into a high-performance sports car.

data.name: Ranger (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Green Autobot Godmaster with a rugged, broad-shouldered build suited for rough terrain. Transforms into an off-road vehicle.

data.name: Road King (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Red Autobot Godmaster with a streamlined racing-inspired body and confident stance. Transforms into a sleek race car.

data.name: Giga (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Green and purple Decepticon Godmaster with a heavy armored frame forming Overlord's lower body. Transforms into a tank.

data.name: Mega (JP Masterforce)
data.description: White and purple Decepticon Godmaster with a sleek aerial frame forming Overlord's upper body. Transforms into a jet.

data.name: Overlord (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Massive white, blue, and red combined Godmaster formed from Giga and Mega, with a tank lower body and jet upper body creating an imposing two-story warrior. One of the largest Decepticons in the series.

data.name: Buster (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Blue Decepticon Godmaster with angular jet-derived wings and a compact fighter pilot build forming Darkwings' lower half. Transforms into a fighter jet.

data.name: Hydra (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Gray Decepticon Godmaster with swept-back wings and a commanding presence forming Darkwings' upper half. Transforms into a fighter jet.

data.name: Darkwings (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Combined Decepticon Godmaster formed from Buster and Hydra, merging their jet modes into a large spacecruiser with powerful twin engines. A formidable aerial combatant.

data.name: Doubleclouder (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Gray Decepticon double agent Godmaster with two faces — one Autobot, one Decepticon — and a bulky missile-launcher equipped frame. Transforms into a missile carrier and a purple falcon.

data.name: Shuta Go (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Blue and white Autobot Headmaster Junior whose human partner transforms into the robot's head, creating a young but agile warrior. Transforms into a Toyota Supra police car.

data.name: Cab (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Red Autobot Headmaster Junior with a bold, heroic design and emergency light bar integrated into his shoulders. Transforms into a fire engine.

data.name: Minerva (JP Masterforce)
data.description: White and red Autobot Headmaster Junior with a slim, feminine robot design and medical cross insignia. Transforms into a Porsche 959 ambulance.

data.name: Wilder (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Gray and blue Decepticon Headmaster Junior with a feral, beast-like robot form featuring clawed hands and sharp fangs. Transforms into a winged wolf beast.

data.name: Cancer (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Purple Decepticon Headmaster Junior with a crustacean-inspired robot mode featuring pincer-like claws and a low, scuttling stance. Transforms into a crab beast.

data.name: Bullhorn (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Brown Decepticon Headmaster Junior with a stocky, muscular robot frame and prominent horn-like protrusions on his head. Transforms into a bull beast.

data.name: Godbomber (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Blue and red drone Transformer with a large, blocky frame designed to combine with Super Ginrai as power-up armor to form God Ginrai. Transforms into a tandem trailer and bomber jet.

data.name: Grand Maximus (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Enormous white, blue, and red Titan-class Autobot even larger than Fortress Maximus, with a towering city-former frame bristling with weapons emplacements. Transforms into a city and a battleship.

data.name: Browning (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Small purple Decepticon with a compact, densely armored robot form who serves as a living weapon for his allies. Transforms into an M1910 Browning pistol.

data.name: Black Zarak (JP Masterforce)
data.description: Massive black and gold Decepticon city-former with a menacing scorpion tail and pincers, rivaling Grand Maximus in sheer size. Transforms into a scorpion and a mobile fortress city.

data.name: Devil Z (JP Masterforce)
data.description: The series' ultimate villain, a malevolent alien energy being who appears as a dark, swirling energy entity with no fixed physical form. Has no alt mode, instead manipulating others through pure destructive energy.

data.name: Star Saber (JP Victory)
data.description: Red, white, and blue Supreme Commander with a heroic winged design and chest cockpit where the small Brainmaster pilot Saber rides. Transforms into a Cybertronian super-jet formed when Saber combines with the V-Star jet body.

data.name: Victory Leo (JP Victory)
data.description: Gold and white warrior with a powerful, bestial frame and pronounced mane-like chest armor. Transforms into a lion and a jet.

data.name: Victory Saber (JP Victory)
data.description: Massive winged warrior formed from Star Saber as the upper body and Victory Leo as the lower body and wings. Towers over other Autobots with golden leg armor and broad swept-back wings.

data.name: Blacker (JP Victory)
data.description: Black-armored Brainmaster with a sleek, angular frame and silver accents across the torso. Transforms into a black sports car.

data.name: Braver (JP Victory)
data.description: Blue-armored Brainmaster with a streamlined build and white highlights on the shoulders and shins. Transforms into a blue sports car.

data.name: Laster (JP Victory)
data.description: Red-armored Brainmaster with bold crimson plating and a compact, athletic frame. Transforms into a red sports car.

data.name: Road Caesar (JP Victory)
data.description: Combined form of the three Brainmasters Blacker, Braver, and Laster. A powerful tri-colored warrior blending black, blue, and red sports car panels into a broad-shouldered fighter.

data.name: Wing (JP Victory)
data.description: White jet Multiforce member with swept-back wings folded on the back and a clean, aerodynamic silhouette. Transforms into a white jet.

data.name: Waver (JP Victory)
data.description: Blue Multiforce member with a compact marine-styled frame and hull panels on the chest. Transforms into a blue hovercraft.

data.name: Dash (JP Victory)
data.description: Red Multiforce member with a sporty, low-profile build and racing stripes across the chest. Transforms into a red race car.

data.name: Tacker (JP Victory)
data.description: Green Multiforce member with a bulky, militaristic frame and missile launcher details on the shoulders. Transforms into a green missile carrier.

data.name: Mach (JP Victory)
data.description: Gray Multiforce member with jet intake details on the torso and a visor-style face. Transforms into a gray jet.

data.name: Tackle (JP Victory)
data.description: Orange Multiforce member with a rugged off-road frame and roll cage details across the chest. Transforms into an orange buggy.

data.name: Landcross (JP Victory)
data.description: Combined form of all six Multiforce members. A multi-colored gestalt warrior assembling jet wings, hovercraft hull, race car panels, missile launchers, and buggy armor into one cohesive figure.

data.name: Greatshot (JP Victory)
data.description: White, red, and blue six-changer with a tall, angular frame and multiple weapon hardpoints. Transforms into a tank, jet, car, drill tank, winged wolf, and gun.

data.name: Galaxy Shuttle (JP Victory)
data.description: Large white Autobot with a broad shuttle fuselage chest and twin booster nacelles on the back. Transforms into a space shuttle.

data.name: Holi (JP Victory)
data.description: Tiny red Micromaster with fire truck ladder details folded on the back. Transforms into a compact red fire truck.

data.name: Fire (JP Victory)
data.description: Small red Micromaster with a stocky build and hose reel details on the arms. Transforms into a red fire engine.

data.name: Boater (JP Victory)
data.description: Small white Micromaster with a nautical hull chest plate and compact proportions. Transforms into a white rescue boat.

data.name: Pipo (JP Victory)
data.description: Small white Micromaster with red cross markings on the chest and a medical-styled design. Transforms into a white ambulance.

data.name: Deathsaurus (JP Victory)
data.description: Massive purple and black Decepticon emperor with enormous bat-like wings, horned helmet, and a fearsome kaiju-scale frame. Transforms into a winged dragon-bird creature.

data.name: Leozack (JP Victory)
data.description: Blue and white Breastforce leader with F-14 wings folded on the back and a lion breast animal partner. Transforms into an F-14 Tomcat fighter jet.

data.name: Drillhorn (JP Victory)
data.description: Brown Breastforce member with a drill mounted on the forearm and a rhino breast animal partner. Transforms into a brown drill tank.

data.name: Killbison (JP Victory)
data.description: Green Breastforce member with heavy tank treads on the legs and a bison breast animal partner. Transforms into a green assault tank.

data.name: Hellbat (JP Victory)
data.description: Black Breastforce member with stealth fighter wings swept back and a bat breast animal partner. Transforms into a black stealth fighter.

data.name: Gaihawk (JP Victory)
data.description: Teal Breastforce member with MiG-29 air intakes on the chest and a hawk breast animal partner. Transforms into a teal MiG-29 Fulcrum fighter jet.

data.name: Jaruga (JP Victory)
data.description: Yellow Breastforce member with a sleek, feline-accented frame and a jaguar breast animal partner. Transforms into a yellow jaguar-themed race car.

data.name: Liokaiser (JP Victory)
data.description: Combined form of all six Breastforce members. A lion-themed gestalt warrior with Leozack's lion motif dominating the chest, combining jet wings, tank treads, and drill components into an imposing figure.
